title: Spicy Sweet Chinese Bananas Ma La Tang
description: A spicy and creamy Cantonese dish featuring bananas, served in a banana leaf vessel, keto-friendly and energizing.
instructions: Toast the Sichuan peppercorns in a dry pan over low heat for 5 minutes.
Grind the toasted Sichuan peppercorns into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
In a blender, combine the coconut cream, granulated sweetener, salt, and ground Sichuan peppercorns, and blend until smooth.
Add the softened beurre-monte to the blender and blend until well combined.
Add the red pepper flakes to the blender and blend until the mixture is spicy and creamy.
Slice the bananas into 1-inch pieces and add them to the blender, blending until they are well coated with the spicy cream mixture.
Prepare the banana leaves by wiping them clean with a damp cloth and cutting out the center stem.
Spoon the spicy banana mixture onto the center of each banana leaf, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the banana leaves over the filling to form a square packet, and press the edges together to seal.
Serve the Spicy Sweet Chinese Bananas Ma La Tang immediately, garnished with additional red pepper flakes if desired.
